title: Chicken Flavoured Meat-Free Lollipops Treats Dog Pet Puppy Reward Good Behaviour Food Easily Digestible Dental Hygiene
features: Meat-Free: These dog treats are entirely rawhide and meat-free, making them an excellent choice for pets with dietary restrictions or sensitivities. They are low in fat, easily digestible, and enriched with essential vitamins and minerals, ensuring your dog gets a nutritious and satisfying snack they’ll love.

Rewards: Whether you’re training your dog or simply want to reward their good behaviour, these treats are a versatile option. Their tasty flavour and chewy texture make them an enjoyable and satisfying snack that your dog will eagerly look forward to.

Reusable Packaging: Each pack comes in a handy reusable pouch with a re-sealable closure, making it easy to keep the treats fresh for longer. This practical packaging ensures that your dog’s snacks are always ready to grab when you need them.

Dental Health: These dog sticks not only serve as a delicious treat but also help promote dental hygiene by encouraging chewing, which can reduce plaque and tartar build-up. Additionally, their easily digestible formula makes them gentle on your dog’s stomach, providing both enjoyment and health benefits.

Variety of Flavors: These treats come in a variety of tempting flavours and designs to keep your dog excited and satisfied. Fortified with calcium for strong teeth and bones, these treats offer a perfect combination of variety, convenience, and nutrition for your furry friend.
description: Product Description Tasty treats Whether you’re training your dog or simply want to reward their good behaviour, these treats are a versatile option. Their tasty flavour and chewy texture make them an enjoyable and satisfying snack that your dog will eagerly look forward to. Reusable Packaging: Each pack comes in a handy reusable pouch with a re-sealable closure, making it easy to keep the treats fresh for longer. This practical packaging ensures that your dog’s snacks are always ready to grab when you need them. These dog sticks not only serve as a delicious treat but also help promote dental hygiene by encouraging chewing, which can reduce plaque and tartar build-up. Additionally, their easily digestible formula makes them gentle on your dog’s stomach, providing both enjoyment and health benefits. Benefits of meat free treats Meat-free treats for dogs offer a healthy and sustainable alternative to traditional snacks. They are ideal for dogs with food allergies, sensitivities, or dietary restrictions, reducing the risk of digestive issues and skin irritations. These treats often contain nutrient-rich ingredients like sweet potatoes, peas, and chickpeas, providing essential vitamins, fibre, and plant-based protein. Additionally, meat-free treats support pet care by reducing the carbon footprint associated with meat production. Available in a variety of flavours:
